title: diasperus vespertilio
intro: Diasperus vespertilio, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. The plant's roots and seeds are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with various medicinal properties. Diasperus vespertilio has been used to treat conditions such as eczema, arthritis, and menstrual cramps due to its anti-inflammatory and hormone-regulating effects. The herbal preparations of evening primrose include oil extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
